channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Matatu sector urges government to provide fuel subsidies and enhance road safety
item.description: The Matatu Owners Association (MOA) has urged the Kenyan government to consider reinstating fuel subsidies if global oil prices surge, to protect commuters from fare hikes. Matatus serve millions dail...

item.title: Trump readies prime‑time address as Iran war drags on and NATO tensions mount
item.description: US President Donald Trump has signalled a major escalation in his stance toward NATO, telling the British newspaper The Telegraph that he is seriously considering withdrawing the United States from th...

item.title: Trump claims Iran requested ceasefire, Tehran denies; tensions remain high
item.description: US President Donald Trump recently claimed that Iran’s new president has asked for a ceasefire in the ongoing conflict, and he further threatened that the United States may withdraw from NATO. However...

item.title: Union Home Minister Reviews Manipur Situation and Calls for Accelerated Peace Efforts
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah held a meeting with Manipur Chief Minister Yumnam Khemchand Singh in New Delhi to assess the ongoing law and order situation in the state. During the discussion, Shah dir...

item.title: President Ruto Backs Social Health Authority and Explains Benefits of New Healthcare Reforms
item.description: President William Ruto has strongly defended his administration’s Social Health Authority (SHA) programme, saying those criticising it either misunderstand it or are politically motivated. During a me...

item.title: Stakeholders Discuss Strategies to Improve Tanzania’s Healthcare System
item.description: Last night for Johari Rotana Hotel, Tanzania health stakeholders gather for important event titled 'Advancing Tanzania’s Health System Efficiency and Leadership Through Multidisciplinary Specialized S...

item.title: King Charles III to Address US Congress During State Visit to Mark 250th Anniversary of American Independence
item.description: King Charles III, accompanied by Queen Camilla, is scheduled to visit the United States this month and has been invited to address a joint session of Congress. The invitation, extended by Speaker Mike...

item.title: AU Sports Council to Visit Nigeria for 2031 African Games Facility Inspection
item.description: The National Sports Commission (NSC) don confirm say Nigeria dey pursue to host the 2031 African Games. Delegates from the African Union Sports Council (AUSC) dey set to land for Abuja from March 30 t...

item.title: BARMM voter registration closes with over 161,000 applicants ahead of postponed elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has officially closed its voters’ registration in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM), registering a total of 161,429 individuals, surpass...

item.title: Operation Ghazab lil-Haq Linked to Notable Decline in Terrorism Deaths: PICSS Report
item.description: According to data from the Pakistan Institute for Conflict and Security Studies (PICSS), Pakistan witnessed a 35 per cent decline in combat-related fatalities during March 2026, coinciding with the la...

item.title: All 48 teams confirmed for the FIFA World Cup 2026 as Socceroos draw Türkiye in Group D
item.description: The full line-up for the FIFA World Cup 2026 has now been finalised after an intense round of last-chance qualifiers across multiple continents. Iraq clinched the final spot with a 2–1 win over Bolivi...

item.title: Defence Minister Orders Troops to Engage Terrorists Immediately in North-East Nigeria
item.description: For Nigeria side, retired Defence Minister, General Christopher Musa, don give clear order say troops wey dey frontline for North-East must shoot any terrorist wey dem see sharp sharp without waiting ...

item.title: Chalmers responds to former Treasury warnings on economic risks and calls for reform
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has responded to warnings from former Treasury secretary Dr Martin Parkinson, who highlighted the potential risk of stagflation in Australia—a combination of high inflation and ...

item.title: Gas Leak at Ogun School Sends 30 Students and Teacher to Hospital
item.description: For true wahala yesterday for Our Lady of Apostles Secondary School, Ijebu Ode, Ogun State, as around 30 students plus one teacher waka enter hospital after gas leak waka happen for school premises. A...

item.title: February U.S. retail sales rise amid auto recovery and inflation concerns
item.description: In February 2026, U.S. retail sales recorded a solid rebound after a slight decline in January, reflecting renewed consumer activity driven largely by stronger vehicle purchases and milder weather. Ac...

item.title: Judge Rules Trump Can Face Civil Lawsuits Over January 6 Rally Speech
item.description: A U.S. judge has ruled that former President Donald Trump is not immune from civil lawsuits regarding his speech at the January 6, 2021 rally, which preceded the Capitol riot. The ruling clarifies tha...

item.title: Iraq Celebrate World Cup Qualification Amid War Tension
item.description: For Baghdad, happiness burst through the city as Iraq national football team secure a spot for the World Cup for the first time since 1986. After a 2-1 victory over Bolivia, celebration scatter the ca...

item.title: Estate agents launch legal action over high Rightmove fees
item.description: Several estate agents in the UK have launched a class action against Rightmove, the leading online property portal, alleging that the platform charges 'unsustainable' subscription fees. The legal acti...

item.title: Government to Start Upgrading Singida Water Institute Campus from 2026/2027
item.description: The Tanzanian government, through the Deputy Minister for Water, Kundo Mathew, has announced plans to start phased construction of buildings at the Water Institute located in Singida. The construction...

item.title: Marrying Millions Cast: 2026 Net Worth Rankings and Relationship Updates
item.description: The reality TV show 'Marrying Millions' showcases couples from diverse financial backgrounds, exploring whether love or money keeps them together. As of 2026, the cast's net worth ranges from $10 mill...
